reforms.description: The Finnish authorities have been very active in stimulating R&D activity, which is expected to influence future productivity growth through improved allocation of capital via changes in taxation of investment income.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating R&D activity is likely to enhance productivity and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities have been very active in stimulating R&D activity.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to enhance R&D, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Apart from measures to stimulate R&D activity, an area where the authorities have been very active...
